reason: Verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, and report the page title as "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the SuperAgent home page with a list of agents in the sidebar
Clicked on the "QA-20260608-190244-e882" agent in the sidebar — The agent chat interface opened, showing the agent name and an input textbox for sending messages
Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — The message was successfully sent and appeared in the chat, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for the agent response (up to 3 minutes) — The agent completed work within 11 seconds and returned the result

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — The response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." and "Done — the page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". Browser closed."
